name: ECR repository image tag mutability not enforced
description: Image tag mutability is set to MUTABLE for this ECR repository, allowing image tags to be overwritten. This undermines deployment traceability and can enable a supply chain attack where a trusted tag is replaced with a malicious image.
remediation: Set image tag mutability to IMMUTABLE. Use unique, content-addressable tags (e.g., commit SHA or build ID) rather than mutable tags like 'latest'. Reference images by digest in deployment manifests.
